ksa_text: Knowledge of AI governance and regulatory compliance requirements, including the EU AI Act risk classification system, NIST AI RMF governance functions, organizational AI policy design, and conformity assessment procedures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI/ML Engineering KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.445) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Strategy and Operations. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.445 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with AI/ML Engineering. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. AI/ML Engineering is not sufficiently central to the VP Data Strategy and Operations to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Strategy and Operations roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI/ML Engineering is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Strategy and Operations. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Strategy and Operations competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.445) and edge-domain placement (AI/ML Engineering) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Strategy and Operations. All passes support exclusion.
